backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Nellore Printing Hub backend, defining all core data types (quotations, projects, reviews, chat, admin users, delivery, etc.) and mixing in blob storage and authorization modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three high-confidence features related to fixing the admin login flow, AdminGuard premature evaluation, and post-login navigation redirect reliability.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, hooks, and pages.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, chart colors, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app titled 'Nellore Printing Hub', mounting the React app at the `#root` div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app file that defines all TanStack Router routes (public, admin, and customer portal), wraps the app with CustomerAuthProvider, and conditionally shows a ProfileSetup modal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that blocks access to admin pages by showing a loading spinner until identity, actor, and admin status are fully resolved, then renders children, an access-denied card, or a registration prompt as appropriate.
frontend/src/components/BilingualText.ts: Presentational component that renders English and Telugu text together, either stacked vertically or inline side-by-side with a separator.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: A mobile-only bottom navigation bar with six tabs (Home, Services, Gallery, Testimonials, Contact, Chat) that highlights the active route and uses i18n labels.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheet.tsx: A reusable bottom sheet modal component that slides up from the bottom of the screen, locks body scroll while open, and renders an optional title with a close button.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheetSelec: A form select component that opens a BottomSheet listing options with checkmarks, triggering haptic feedback on selection and exposing a controlled value/onChange API.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: A floating chat widget that displays conversation history for an authenticated user and allows sending messages via the backend, with name/email validation for unauthenticated fallback.
frontend/src/components/CustomerGuard.ts: A route guard component that redirects unauthenticated customers to the login page and renders children only when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggle.t: A button that toggles the app language between English and Telugu, displaying both language labels and triggering haptic feedback on switch.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app shell providing a sticky header with desktop navigation, language toggle, admin link, a Get Quote CTA, a footer, and the mobile BottomNav.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: An Internet Identity login/logout button that handles authentication state, shows a loading spinner during login, and clears the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/NegotiationHisto: Renders a scrollable chat-style history of negotiation messages between a customer and admin, distinguishing sides with icons and timestamps.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A modal dialog form for first-time users to save their name, email, and mobile number to their profile, with validation and haptic feedback.
frontend/src/components/ProjectDetailMod: A modal dialog component that displays detailed information about a selected project, including its image, title, category badge, description, and completion date, with bilingual (English/Telugu) support.
frontend/src/components/PullToRefreshCon: A wrapper component that adds pull-to-refresh functionality to its children using touch events, showing a spinner indicator during pulling and refreshing states.
frontend/src/components/ShareAppButton.t: A button component that triggers the native Web Share API or falls back to clipboard copy to share the app's URL and description.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonCard.tsx: A loading skeleton placeholder component that renders animated shimmer cards in four variants: project, review, quotation, and a default service layout.
frontend/src/components/SwipeContainer.t: A wrapper component that enables horizontal swipe-based navigation by applying a translateX transform during touch swipe gestures.
frontend/src/contexts/CustomerAuthContex: A React context that manages customer authentication state, persisting session data (customerId and identifier) to localStorage with login and logout methods.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: A React context that manages the active language (English or Telugu), persists the choice to localStorage, and provides a translation lookup function.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: A hook that queries the backend to check whether the currently authenticated Internet Identity caller has admin privileges.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: A hook that exposes a mutation for verifying admin credentials by hashing the password with SHA-256 and calling the backend's verifyAuthentication method.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminContent.ts: Hooks for fetching and updating the admin-managed site content (contact info, services, hours, gallery, etc.) via the backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminExists.ts: A hook that checks whether any admin users exist in the backend by querying the admin user count.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminInvitations.t: Hooks for listing existing admin invitations and creating new ones by hashing the password and calling the backend's inviteAdminUser method.
Hooks for registering the first admin via Internet Identity principal and for seeding the first admin's email/password credentials when no admin exists yet.
frontend/src/hooks/useBiometricAuth.ts: Provides two React Query mutation hooks for biometric authentication: `useBiometricLogin` for authenticating via WebAuthn and `useRegisterBiometric` for registering a new biometric credential, both backed by the actor's `registerBiometric` call.
frontend/src/hooks/useChat.ts: Exports React Query hooks for chat functionality including sending messages, fetching all chat messages, owner replies, and retrieving chat history for a specific customer by email.
frontend/src/hooks/useCompanyLogo.ts: Provides hooks to fetch (`useGetCompanyLogo`) and update (`useSetCompanyLogo`) the company logo via the actor, invalidating the cached logo on mutation success.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactInfo.ts: Provides hooks to retrieve (`useGetContactInfo`) and update (`useUpdateContactInfo`) contact information (email, phone, address, maps link) through the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomerQuotations: Exports a single query hook `useGetCustomerQuotations` that fetches all quotation requests for a given customer ID via the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useDelivery.ts: Provides hooks to fetch delivery configuration, calculate a delivery fee for a given distance, and update the delivery config (per-km rate and minimum fee) via the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, identity state, and status flags to child components via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useNegotiation.ts: Exports a mutation hook `useRespondToNegotiation` that sends a negotiation response for a quotation and invalidates related quotation query caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useOfficeLocation.ts: Provides hooks to get (`useGetOfficeLocation`) and set (`useSetOfficeLocation`) the office location via the actor, with cache invalidation on update.
frontend/src/hooks/useProjects.ts: Exports React Query hooks for full CRUD operations on projects: fetching all projects, fetching by category, adding, editing, and deleting projects via the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/usePullToRefresh.ts: Implements a pull-to-refresh gesture hook that tracks touch events, measures pull distance against a threshold, and triggers an async refresh callback when the threshold is met.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationFile.ts: Exports a query hook `useGetQuotationFile` that fetches the reply file blob for a given quotation ID using the actor's `getReplyFile` method.
Provides a mutation hook `useQuotationResponse` that submits a status response (with optional message) for a quotation and invalidates quotation caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotations.ts: Provides React Query hooks for quotation CRUD operations including creating, fetching, approving, and updating quotation status via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationStatistic: Exports a query hook `useQuotationStatistics` that fetches aggregated quotation counts by status from the actor, refreshing every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useReviews.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching all reviews, filtering by rating, and adding new reviews via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useServiceImages.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and deleting service images via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeNavigation.ts: Custom hook that enables touch-based swipe navigation between a predefined set of page routes using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and saving the current caller's user profile via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoClips.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and deleting video clips via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark theme CSS custom properties for a print-industry-inspired color palette, along with utility classes for shimmer animations and mobile layout.
frontend/src/lib/blobStorage.ts: Wraps the backend ExternalBlob class to provide a typed frontend interface for creating blobs from URLs or bytes and tracking upload progress.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClient, InternetIdentity, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders the About page with a hero section, a grid of company benefits, and a commitment statement, using i18n translations.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AboutContentMan: Admin page for editing and saving the About page's custom text content, protected by AdminGuard, using a textarea form backed by the admin content hooks.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Admin dashboard displaying quotation status statistics as stat cards and a grid of navigation links to all admin management sections, protected by AdminGuard.
Admin login page supporting email/password, biometric, and Internet Identity authentication methods, with auto-seeding of first admin credentials and redirect logic after successful login.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminRegistrati: Admin registration form with email/password validation that creates a new admin account via the invite mutation and redirects to the login page on success.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminUserManage: Admin-guarded page for listing existing admin users and inviting new ones via a dialog form, displaying admins in a table with status badges.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BusinessHoursMa: Admin-guarded page for viewing and editing per-day business hours (open/close times or closed), persisting changes via the admin content update hook.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ChatManagementP: Admin-guarded chat management page that groups customer messages by email, displays conversation threads, and allows the owner to send replies to individual messages.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ContactInfoMana: Admin page for editing and saving contact information (email, phone, address, maps link) with bilingual (English/Telugu) labels, protected by AdminGuard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DeliveryConfigM: Admin page for configuring delivery pricing (per-km rate and minimum fee in rupees), converting to/from paise for backend storage, with bilingual support.
frontend/src/pages/admin/HomepageContent: Admin page for editing and saving the homepage promotional/announcement text, displayed as a banner, with bilingual (English/Telugu) UI.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LogoManagementP: Admin page for uploading and previewing the company logo image (max 5MB), with upload progress tracking and display of the current logo.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectManageme: Admin page for creating, editing, and deleting portfolio projects with title, description, category, and image upload support via a dialog form.
frontend/src/pages/admin/QuotationManage: Admin page for viewing and managing all customer quotations, supporting status transitions (customer pending, payment acceptance) with expandable detail cards.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ServiceMediaMan: Admin page for managing service media, allowing admins to add and delete service images and video clips organized by service type (digital, banner, offset, design) via tabbed UI.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUsPage.tsx: Renders the Contact Us page with contact info cards (phone, email, address) fetched from the backend and a message submission form.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerLogi: Customer login page that authenticates users via email or mobile and SHA-256 hashed password against the backend actor, then redirects to the customer portal.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerPort: Customer portal dashboard displaying the logged-in customer's quotations with status badges and a progress bar showing order lifecycle steps.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerRegi: Customer registration page that collects email, mobile, and password, hashes the password with SHA-256, and calls the backend actor to create a new customer account.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryInfoPage.tsx: Displays delivery pricing information (per-km rate and minimum fee) fetched from the backend, and provides an interactive calculator where users can input a distance to estimate their delivery fee.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page showcasing the printing service's hero banner, feature highlights, service categories, and print sample images with navigation CTAs.
frontend/src/pages/MyQuotationsPage.tsx: Lists the current user's quotation requests with status badges and expandable detail sections showing price, description, terms, and downloadable admin reply files, with support for customer approval actions.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectGalleryPage.ts: Displays a filterable masonry-style gallery of completed projects, allowing users to filter by service category and open a detail modal for individual projects.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationConfirmation: A post-submission confirmation page that shows the new quotation ID and a numbered list of next steps, with buttons to navigate to the user's quotations list or back to the home page.
A form page for submitting a new print quotation request, collecting service type, deadline, project details, contact info, and design status, with validation and navigation to the confirmation page on success.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationResponsePage: Displays a customer-facing page listing their quotations with cards that support accepting, rejecting, negotiating, and approving prices, including negotiation history and status badges with bilingual (English/Telugu) labels.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Renders a services overview page showcasing four printing/design service types (digital, banner, offset, design) with bilingual descriptions, features, and a call-to-action to request a quotation.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitReviewPage.tsx: Provides a form page for authenticated customers to submit a review with name, star rating, review text, project type, and an optional image upload, then navigates to the testimonials page on success.
frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx: Displays a paginated, filterable grid of customer reviews with star-rating filters, pull-to-refresh, and a button to navigate to the review submission page; requires authentication to view.
frontend/src/translations/en.ts: English translation strings for the entire application, covering navigation, services, quotation flow, customer portal, and UI labels.
frontend/src/translations/index.ts: Exports English and Telugu translation objects and provides a helper function to select the correct translation record based on the active language.
frontend/src/translations/te.ts: Telugu language translation strings for the Nellore Printing Hub app, covering UI labels for navigation, services, quotation forms, order status, customer portal, and more.
frontend/src/utils/haptics.ts: Provides haptic feedback utilities using the browser Vibration API, with methods for tap, success, error, and selection feedback patterns.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/src/utils/webauthn.ts: WebAuthn helper functions for biometric authentication, including support detection, credential registration, authentication, and ArrayBuffer/Base64 conversion utilities.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, fonts, border radii, shadows, and keyframe animations, with typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing three existing fix features targeting the admin login redirect flow, AdminGuard premature evaluation, and post-login navigation reliability in production.
